title: COPY INTO from .. LOCKED doubles input data
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(v1 INT, v2 VARCHAR(50), v3 DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
INSERT INTO t1(v1, v2) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
INSERT INTO t1(v1, v2, v3) SELECT v1 + 1, v2, CURRENT_DATE FROM t1 WHERE v3 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: COPY INTO from LOCKED doubles input data
